description: NHVR Bridge Asset & Restriction Management - Security Configuration

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Full administrative access - manage bridges, restrictions, and attribute definitions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.BridgeManager
scopes.description: Create and edit bridge records and restrictions

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Viewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to bridge and restriction data

attributes.name: Groups
attributes.description: AD / IdP group membership — used for group-to-role-collection mapping in BTP Trust Configuration

attributes.name: tenantCode
attributes.description: Multi-tenant identifier — resolved from XSUAA custom attribute or X-Tenant-Code header

role-templates.name: BridgeManager
role-templates.description: Bridge and Restriction Manager - full business access

role-collections.name: NHVR_BridgeManager
role-collections.description: NHVR Bridge Manager / Engineer Role Collection

role-collections.name: NHVR_Viewer
role-collections.description: NHVR General Staff Viewer Role Collection
